trigger_reason: R770 is rank by mechanical-PASS proximity in E31 (post-filter architectural candidate with kw=2; tree-stream max sim=0.40). Per program_v10.md §2.5 (preserved in v11/v12), top-3 rounds receive full step-13 spec.

A_candidate.name: Tropical (min-plus) attention layer
A_candidate.description: Replace softmax attention with min-plus algebra attention: attention weights computed via tropical product (min + add) instead of softmax(QK)V. Sub-quadratic via tropical sparsity.

B_control.name: Linear attention (Performer/Linformer)
B_control.distinctive_parameter_value: no new module / same architecture without the new pathway

statistical_test.name: paired t-test A vs B + A vs C

distinguishability_pre_check.rationale: Tropical attention is algorithmically distinct from softmax/linear/LSH attention (different algebraic structure entirely). Min-plus attention can produce extremely sparse attention patterns by design (dominated by min over keys per query). Expected: distinguishable attention patterns and likely-distinguishable downstream accuracy.
distinguishability_pre_check.v12_observation: Step 05.5 PASS = architectural-topology-change; candidate has a new learnable module with distinct computational signature from baseline. Distinguishability pre-check leans more toward true/uncertain than v11's typical 'uncertain' default.

notes_for_executor: R770's architectural-topology candidate (post-v12-step-05.5-PASS) has structurally-distinct mechanism from baseline B. The new learnable module adds a distinct computation graph edge.
